productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Adi Light Blue White Shoe
description: Sleek and feminine, the adiLight for women from adidas is specially designed for the fashion forward fitness freaks. While it makes for a great trainer, these sneakers also look and feel good when teamed with jeans or casuals. Upper Synthetic mesh upper and tongue for maximum ventilation Suede and synthetic leather overlays for added shoe structure and midfoot support Three striped overlays on sides representing the brand's motto of perseverence and performance Synthetic laces for snug Fit and durability Lightly padded tongue for comfort adidas logo on tongue to create a fashion statement Lightly padded sockliner for in step comfort and snug fit Synthetic overlay at upper heel cup for enhanced durability Midsole EVA midsole for comfort and durability Lightly padded footbed for impact protection and comfort Outsole Made of non-marking durable rubber for ehanced durability Diamond shaped grooves for added grip and traction Pivot point on big toe mound for easy 180° movement of forefoot without injuring the leg Vertical grooved box on inner arch for ergonomic comfort and support for medial foot Reinforced toe guard on the upper for forefoot protection Wash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
